creator: dokas@oitsec.umn.edu
text:
Attempt to build p5-POE and find this:

% cd /usr/ports/*/p5-POE
% sudo make
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/File/Spec.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/Test/More.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/Compress/Zlib.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/Event.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/Filter/Util/Call.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/IO.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on package: p5-Storable>=2.16 - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on package: p5-POE-Test-Loops>=1.021 - not found
===>    Verifying install for p5-POE-Test-Loops>=1.021 in /usr/ports/devel/p5-POE-Test-Loops
===>   p5-POE-Test-Loops-1.021 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/POE.pm - not found
===>    Verifying install for /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/POE.pm in /usr/ports/devel/p5-POE
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/File/Spec.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/Test/More.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/Compress/Zlib.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/Event.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/Filter/Util/Call.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/IO.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on package: p5-Storable>=2.16 - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on package: p5-POE-Test-Loops>=1.021 - not found
===>    Verifying install for p5-POE-Test-Loops>=1.021 in /usr/ports/devel/p5-POE-Test-Loops
===>   p5-POE-Test-Loops-1.021 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/POE.pm - not found
===>    Verifying install for /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/POE.pm in /usr/ports/devel/p5-POE
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach/File/Spec.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/Test/More.pm - found
===>   p5-POE-1.0070 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/Compress/Zlib.pm - found
.
.
.

Fix: 

I suspect that p5-POE should not depend on p5-POE-Test-Loops since the former must be installed
for the later to be built.  Removing that dependency from p5-POE/Makefile allows me to build POE
and all of it's components again.
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/*/p5-POE
sudo make
